resources.string: Blocks Reels, Shorts, and other short-form feeds in social apps.

Reels Blocker uses Android Accessibility Service only to detect and block short-form video feeds such as Reels, Shorts, Spotlight, and similar content in supported apps. All processing happens locally on your device. Your data is never collected, stored, shared, or sent to any server. Accessibility access is used solely for blocking short-form videos according to your settings.
If Reels Blocker does not appear or cannot be turned on: open App info → ⋮ menu → Allow restricted settings, then try again.
